name: codoop-flow
description: codoop-flow: in-session orchestration for an AI-coding ticket pipeline (build/verify/review/ship) with a deterministic guardrail CLI.

plugins.name: codoop-discover
plugins.description: Venture-Discovery Loop: collaborative product discovery with multi-role expert agents (PM, GTM, UX/UI, Architect). Generates comprehensive backlog documentation.

plugins.name: codoop-ticket
plugins.description: Human-Centric Loop: design work tickets in-session with three-stage workflow (PRD -> Spec -> Plan). Auto-infers metadata. Integrates Phase 1 backlog and calls spec-driven-development and planning-and-task-breakdown skills.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Design technical specifications before coding. Create APIs, data schemas, and UI contracts. Standalone or as Phase 2 of codoop-ticket workflow.

plugins.name: planning-and-task-breakdown
plugins.description: Break down specs into ordered, implementable tasks. Vertical-slice planning with task sizing guidelines. Standalone or as Phase 3 of codoop-ticket workflow.

plugins.name: definition-of-done
plugins.description: Project-level completion standards (Correctness, Quality, Integration, Documentation, Ship-readiness). Reference during implementation to ensure consistent quality.

plugins.name: codoop-ux-walkthrough
plugins.description: Simulate a runnable product task from a chosen persona and produce a non-blocking, evidence-backed experience report for human review.

plugins.name: incremental-implementation
plugins.description: Split large code changes into small, verifiable vertical slices. Each slice: implement -> test -> verify -> commit. Core discipline for Loop 3 build phase.

plugins.name: debugging-and-error-recovery
plugins.description: Systematic root-cause analysis and self-healing for test failures. Denoise error logs, classify errors, inject debug prompts. Core discipline for Loop 3 debug phase.

plugins.name: test-driven-development
plugins.description: Red-Green-Refactor cycle: write tests first, implement minimal code, then refactor. Covers happy path, boundary values, and error cases.

plugins.name: codoop-flow
plugins.description: Drive codoop-flow tickets in-session: pick -> build -> verify -> review -> ship, plus human-facing discover and ticket-lifecycle CLIs.
